questions.question: जनवरी से दिसंबर तक महीनों के नाम क्रम से लिखिए।
questions.answer: जनवरी, फरवरी, मार्च, अप्रैल, मई, जून, जुलाई, अगस्त, सितंबर, अक्टूबर, नवंबर, दिसंबर
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the names of the months from January to December in order.

English meaning of the answer: The months are January, February, March, April, May, June, July, August, September, October, November, and December.

questions.question: सही वर्तनी लिखिए: अप्रेल
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the correct spelling of "अप्रेल."

English meaning of the answer: The correct spelling is अप्रैल, which means April.

questions.question: 31 से 40 तक हिंदी गिनती लिखिए।
questions.answer: इकतीस, बत्तीस, तैंतीस, चौंतीस, पैंतीस, छत्तीस, सैंतीस, अड़तीस, उनतालीस, चालीस
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the Hindi counting from 31 to 40.

English meaning of the answer: These are the Hindi words for thirty-one to forty.

questions.question: 32 का हिंदी रूप लिखिए।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the Hindi word for 32.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is thirty-two.

questions.question: नोटबुक के अनुसार हमारे भीतर कैसी भावना होनी चाहिए?
questions.answer: हमारे भीतर सभी के प्रति प्रेम की भावना होनी चाहिए।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: According to the notebook, what feeling should we have within us?

English meaning of the answer: We should have feelings of love towards everyone.

questions.question: नोटबुक के अनुसार हम सभी के बीच में क्या समानता है?
questions.answer: हम सबमें एक ही ईश्वर का वास है और हम सभी समान हैं।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: According to the notebook, what is common among all of us?

English meaning of the answer: The same God lives in all of us and all of us are equal.

questions.question: नोटबुक के अनुसार ऋषियों ने क्या बात बताई है?
questions.answer: ऋषियों ने बताया है कि कोई बड़ा नहीं और कोई छोटा नहीं, हम सब समान हैं।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: According to the notebook, what did the sages tell us?

English meaning of the answer: They told us that no one is great or small and all of us are equal.

questions.question: नोटबुक के अनुसार कवि ने कैसी रात लाने को कहा है?
questions.answer: कवि ने खुशियों भरी चाँदनी रात लाने को कहा है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: According to the notebook, what kind of night did the poet ask for?

English meaning of the answer: The poet asked for a happy moonlit night.

questions.question: शब्दार्थ लिखिए: पंथ
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the meaning of पंथ.

English meaning of the answer: It means path.

questions.question: शब्दार्थ लिखिए: सताना
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the meaning of सताना.

English meaning of the answer: It means to trouble.
